ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event category ID */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event type ID */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value associated with the event (e.g., 495adb1b9777002ecfe22aaf52fcee93) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "to_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the to-ID */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., internal, external, sensor) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the event */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_id") REFERENCES to_ids ("to_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uuids" (
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier (UUID) for each event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the UUID was generated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the UUID (e.g., API, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uuid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uuids_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "to_ids" (
  "to_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each to-ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the to-ID */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the to-ID is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the to-ID */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the to-ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the to-ID was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the to-ID was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("to_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_to_ids_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_to_ids_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role ID */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role ID */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user-role mapping */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user-role mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role ID */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission ID */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role-permission mapping */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role-permission mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
